testcase.name: getBySubject_returnsCorrectList

testcase.name: getBySubject_returnsEmptyWhenSubjectUnknown
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-18T15:35:58.871+03:00 INFO 20528 --- [ main] c.e.b.service.BookServiceImpl : getBySubject called for subject=unknown 2026-04-18T15:35:58.871+03:00 DEBUG 20528 --- [ main] c.e.b.service.BookServiceImpl : No subject found for name=unknown

testcase.name: getTopAuthors_ranksCorrectly
